title: 1 step DFU - Content of the Software Update tab when there is update available only for Charge Case
scenario: Software Update tab shows Charge Case update available with release notes and Update button while earbuds are marked up to date on Poly Voyager Free 60+
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with Osprey (Poly Voyager Free 60+) connected, ensuring only the Charge Case has a firmware update available (CC on at least version 5039, earbuds on latest version).
2. Tap the Settings icon (gear icon) on the Home screen.
4. Observe the displayed information for both the earbuds and the Charge Case.
expected: Earbuds are marked as 'Up to date'. Charge Case shows current version, available version, release notes, and an 'Update' button.
